App.title: BuiltApp
App.description: An interactive sandboxed application created by the AI engine.

id.description: The unique ID of the application document

description.description: Brief summary of what the app does

prompt.description: The prompt or instruction used to generate the app

code.description: The complete self-contained HTML/JS/CSS code bundle

category.description: Aesthetic or functional category of the app

icon.description: Lucide icon string name used to represent the app

creatorId.description: Firebase UID or guest session ID of the creator

creatorEmail.description: Primary email of the creator or guest indicator

published.description: Whether the app is shared with the community marketplace

likesCount.description: Total number of likes accrued by the app

createdAt.description: The date when the app was initially crafted

updatedAt.description: The date of the last incremental improvement

features.description: Key interactive features generated for the app

Comment.title: AppComment
Comment.description: A community feedback comment on a published application.

/apps/{appId}.description: Primary database collection storing all user-crafted and published mobile responsive web apps.

/apps/{appId}/comments/{commentId}.description: Sub-collection under each custom app storing community reviews and feedback.
